companies.name: Simantic
companies.originalOneLiner: Firmware simulation for AI agents
companies.originalDescription: Simantic is modernizing the embedded firmware industry with hardware simulation developed for the adoption of AI in hardware engineering. Simantic gives both humans and AI the visibility into hardware previously limited by the physical world.
companies.story: Simantic 是一家做嵌入式固件仿真工具的公司，切的是芯片和硬件开发的基础设施。想象你是一个硬件工程团队的负责人，每次修改嵌入式代码都要烧录到真实芯片上测试，一烧就是几分钟甚至几小时，迭代慢得像在泥里走路。Simantic 用硬件仿真技术让智能体也能像人一样“看见”硬件内部状态，在虚拟环境里快速验证固件逻辑，把迭代周期从小时级压缩到秒级。团队只有四个人，来自 YC 秋季 2026 批次，正在招聘，说明这个方向已经跑通了初步验证。

companies.name: Callab AI
companies.originalOneLiner: AI voice agents for on-prem telephony stack.
companies.originalDescription: 58% of the $400B call center industry runs on on-prem phone systems, and until now bringing AI voice automation to them meant ripping out their entire infrastructure first. That's the largest unserved segment in the market. Callab AI connects directly to legacy PBX systems like Avaya, Cisco UCM, and Mitel, and automates up to 70% of call volume with zero migration needed. We plug into these environments without requiring a rip-and-replace. We serve clients across three continents, including brands like Dunkin Donuts.
companies.story: Callab AI 做的是连接传统电话系统的语音智能体，切的是呼叫中心基础设施升级这个巨大市场。假如你是某个大型呼叫中心的运营负责人，公司还在用 Avaya 或 Cisco 的老式交换机，想引入人工智能语音客服就必须把整套系统换掉，成本高到不敢动。Callab AI 直接插进这些旧系统，无需替换任何硬件就能自动处理最多七成来电。YC 春季 2026 批次，团队七人，正在招聘，客户已经覆盖三大洲，包括 Dunkin Donuts 这样的品牌。

companies.name: Pocket
companies.originalOneLiner: Take Notes in the Real World
companies.originalDescription: Pocket is a Y Combinator W26 company building a premium hardware plus software product in the AI voice recorder space. We are obsessed with quality and speed. We are scaling very fast in the US and now European markets and building a device experience that can become the category leader.
companies.story: Pocket 是一家做人工智能语音记录硬件的公司，方向是随身设备而不是手机应用。想象你是一个会议很多的咨询顾问，每天要记大量要点，用手机录音不仅耗电快，还容易在嘈杂环境里录不清。Pocket 做了一台独立的硬件设备，把麦克风、降噪和人工智能转录都装进一个小盒子里，专注做好“在真实世界里记笔记”这一件事。它来自 YC 冬季 2026 批次，团队十五人，正在招聘，在美国和欧洲市场增长很快，目标是成为这个品类的领导者。

companies.name: Redouble AI
companies.location: New York City, NY, USA; Remote
companies.originalOneLiner: Java-native multi-agentic AI operating system for enterprise
companies.originalDescription: At Redouble AI we have developed Silverlake, a Java-native agentic AI operating system for enterprise. While other AI solutions force enterprise stakeholders to embrace unfamiliar concepts in an unfamiliar language, we do the opposite: we slot agentic AI right into the enterprise comfort zone - by mapping all agentic concepts onto established enterprise primitives in their own language, their own security model, their own infrastructure. It’s like moving from Bitcoin to Stablecoin, just for agentic AI. When we did YC we realized there was no framework or platform that gave us as enterprise and workflow automation veterans what we needed to build truly secure, reliable, and scalable agentic solutions for mission-critical workflows. That’s why we spent the past 18 months building Silverlake from the ground up. We empower the 12 million Java engineers worldwide to write and deploy their own AI, securely, at scale. They define an agent in a few lines of code, and our platform does everything else, from orchestration to permission control, from auditability to rate limiting, from long-running agents to autonomous coordinated networks that perform the work of entire departments. Silverlake has been developed with design partners across biopharma, insurance and financial services. For example, our agentic workflows write submission-ready Clinical Study Reports that are hundreds of pages long, analyze entire datarooms full of financial and operational data for private equity investors, and automate claims processing for a large insurance player. We are backed by Y Combinator, Exponential, Transpose Platform, Tiny VC, and the Oxford Seed Fund and advised by Java inventor James Gosling and automation guru Professor Christian Terwiesch.
companies.story: Redouble AI 做的是企业级的智能体操作系统，但特别之处在于它完全用 Java 构建，切的是大型企业不想学新语言的痛点。想象你是一家银行的技术负责人，团队全是 Java 工程师，想用人工智能智能体来自动化反洗钱审核流程，但市面上的方案都要求你学 Python 或者新框架。Redouble AI 的 Silverlake 平台把智能体概念映射成企业熟悉的角色、权限和基础设施，让一千二百万 Java 工程师直接用自己会的语言写智能体。YC 夏季 2024 批次，团队三人，花十八个月从零搭建了这个系统。

companies.name: Dispatch
companies.originalOneLiner: Satellites for Manufacturing in Space
companies.originalDescription: Dispatch is building refurbishable reentry vehicles that host and return payloads for companies making ultra-high-value materials (semiconductors, biotech, and pharma) that can only be manufactured in space. Right now, these companies have no practical way to manufacture and get their products back to Earth. We solve this bottleneck. We just returned from the Mojave Desert testing our first full-scale reentry heat shield designed to protect the satellite as it returns from space at Mach 20+, built in an apartment for 100x cheaper than competitors. To test, we held it behind a rocket engine to simulate the forces of atmospheric reentry. IT WORKED! Watch here - https://youtu.be/dhlQmnIoptg To scale, we anchor permanent infrastructure in orbit - building high power Autonomous Space Stations designed from day one for "lights-out" manufacturing serviced by the reentry vehicles.
companies.story: Dispatch 做的是可回收的太空返回飞行器，切的是空间制造这个前沿方向。想象你是一家半导体材料公司的研发负责人，你发现某些超纯晶体只能在微重力环境下生长，但造出来之后没法安全运回地球。Dispatch 造了一款带可重复使用隔热罩的返回舱，刚刚在莫哈韦沙漠用火箭发动机模拟了以二十倍音速重返大气的条件，隔热罩测试成功了。他们计划在轨道上建造自动化空间站，实现“无灯制造”并定期返回产品。YC 春季 2026 批次，团队两人，正在招聘。

companies.name: Lumius
companies.originalOneLiner: Fast, smart, accessible 3D ultrasound that anyone can use
companies.originalDescription: Ultrasound today is still mostly 2D. Clinicians have to imagine the 3D anatomy in their head while also moving the probe at the same time. This makes procedures like vascular access hard to learn and perform consistently, especially for beginners. ~50% fail on their first attempt. Hospitals also spend millions each year on 2D ultrasound training. Meanwhile, existing 3D ultrasound devices can cost >10× as much. Lumius is building fast, smart, and accessible 3D ultrasound systems to eliminate this 2D guesswork. Our technology shows a clear, real-time 3D view of what’s inside the body. It works over a large volume, not just a thin slice. The device is also affordable, compact, and portable. We are starting with vascular access, especially central line. Future use cases include blood clot detection, tumor diagnosis, and biopsy guidance. Our long-term vision is a universal 3D ultrasound platform that brings easy-to-use, real-time imaging to a wide range of clinical and eventually consumer applications.
companies.story: Lumius 做的是快速、智能、人人都能用的三维超声设备，切的是传统二维超声需要医生在脑中想象立体结构的痛点。想象你是一个刚毕业的住院医师，第一次给病人做中心静脉穿刺，手里拿着二维超声探头，脑子里要同时想象血管的三维走向，大约一半新手第一次会失败。Lumius 的设备直接显示实时的三维图像，覆盖一个大范围而不是一个薄片，而且价格只有现有三维超声的十分之一，小巧便携。他们从血管穿刺场景开始，未来可用于血栓检测和肿瘤诊断。YC 春季 2026 批次，团队四人，正在招聘。

companies.name: Limitless
companies.originalOneLiner: Wearable AI pendant and meeting memory product.
companies.originalDescription: Limitless builds a wearable and software layer for remembering conversations, summarizing meetings, and helping people search what was said later.
companies.story: Limitless 做的是可穿戴的人工智能挂坠和会议记忆软件，切的是“记不住说过的话”这个日常麻烦。想象你是一个每天开五六个会的产品经理，会后总是想不起某个细节，翻录音又太耗时。Limitless 的挂坠可以戴在身上，自动记录对话并生成摘要，事后还能搜索任何一句话。它不是一个手机应用，而是一个专门的硬件加软件层，把麦克风和人工智能处理放在一个独立的设备里，让你不用掏出手机就能捕捉一切。

companies.name: LnkFlow
companies.originalOneLiner: Agentic click tracking that shows what grows your business
companies.originalDescription: Agentic click tracking that shows what grows your business
companies.story: LnkFlow 做的是智能化的链接点击追踪工具，切的是营销人员想知道“哪个渠道真正带来增长”的需求。想象你是一个增长团队的负责人，每天看一堆点击数据，但分不清哪些点击最后转化成了付费用户。LnkFlow 用智能体自动分析点击行为，直接告诉你哪些链接在推动业务增长，而不是只给你一堆数字。它来自 Product Hunt，适合那些想用人工智能替代手动数据分析的团队。

companies.name: Reignat
companies.originalOneLiner: Privacy-friendly web analytics with realtime AI insights
companies.originalDescription: Privacy-friendly web analytics with realtime AI insights
companies.story: Reignat 做的是注重隐私的网站分析工具，同时用人工智能提供实时洞察。想象你是一个独立站点的运营者，想了解访客行为但又不想用谷歌分析那样收集太多个人信息。Reignat 在保护访客隐私的前提下，用人工智能实时分析流量趋势，告诉你哪些页面最受欢迎、用户从哪里来，而且数据不会泄露给第三方。它来自 Product Hunt，适合对数据合规要求严格的小团队或个人站长。

companies.name: Coasty
companies.originalOneLiner: YC S26) – An API for computer-use agents
companies.originalDescription: YC S26) – An API for computer-use agents
companies.story: Coasty 做的是让智能体操控电脑的接口，切的是开发者需要让智能体像人一样操作浏览器或桌面应用的需求。想象你是一个自动化工程师，想写一个智能体来自动填写企业管理系统里的表单，但每个系统的界面都不一样。Coasty 提供了一套接口，让智能体可以“看”屏幕、“点”按钮、“填”输入框，就像一个人在使用电脑那样。它来自 YC 夏季 2026 批次，目前以 Launch HN 形式发布，适合做 RPA 或浏览器自动化的团队。

readings.title: Product Discovery
readings.story: 一个产品团队最怕的不是没想法，而是花几个月做出来才发现没人用。产品发现这个环节，很多团队以为就是开几个会、画几个原型，结果在用户理解、需求取舍上反复走弯路。这篇来自硅谷产品集团的文章，不是讲一套标准流程，而是告诉你那些看似简单的判断背后，作者是怎么拆问题的。读的时候可以留意：他是怎么发现真正值得解决的问题，又是怎么判断哪些功能该砍掉的。

readings.title: Product strategy in a growing company
readings.story: 产品刚上线时，团队可以凭直觉做决定，因为用户少、场景简单。可一旦用户量上来，原来的策略就会失效，团队会陷入混乱：是该加功能还是优化现有功能？该服务所有用户还是只服务核心用户？Intercom 的这篇文章用真实案例解释了为什么增长阶段的产品策略必须改变。读的时候可以关注：作者如何根据用户行为和市场变化来调整方向，而不是死守最初计划。

readings.title: Shape Up
readings.story: 很多产品团队陷入一个怪圈：定了截止日期却做不完，或者做完了发现不是用户要的。问题往往出在规划阶段：需求太模糊，或者范围太大。Basecamp 的《Shape Up》提供了一套不同的做法：先给问题“定形”，再设定时间盒，让团队在固定周期内自主决定怎么做。读的时候可以重点看：作者如何把一个模糊想法变成可执行的计划，以及怎么在过程中控制范围不失控。

companies.name: Armature
companies.originalOneLiner: Armature builds, monitors and optimizes products' Agent Experience.
companies.originalDescription: Armature helps companies monitor, analyze, and optimize how AI agents experience their products. What we do today: - Automated testing: We run complex sessions against your MCPs/CLIs across all major harnesses and models to catch broken workflows before your users do. - AX analytics & benchmarking: No more black boxes. We trace agent sessions to show you exactly what the model "thought", what context it missed, and why it failed. We measure your AX against competitors to ensure you remain the preferred platform for agents to use. - Auto-remediation: Our MCP lets your internal coding agents plug into Armature to autonomously fix your product's AX based on our run data. Our vision for tomorrow: Reaching full understanding of how agents use your product and how you can improve it is only step one. The next step is to provide the foundational infrastructure for the Agent Experience, powering agent-native revenue, lifecycle marketing, and customer support for the next generation of software.
companies.story: 这家公司做的是人工智能时代的用户体验监测，只不过用户变成了智能体。想象你是一家软件公司的工程负责人，你的产品开始被各种人工智能智能体调用，但你完全不知道它们在你的接口里遇到了什么障碍。Armature 能自动运行测试，追踪智能体每一步的思考轨迹，甚至让内部编码智能体根据运行数据自动修复体验问题。它来自 YC 2026 年春季批次，团队目前三人，正在把智能体体验变成一门可测量、可优化的工程学科。

companies.name: Tesora
companies.originalOneLiner: Frontier AI for Actuaries
companies.originalDescription: Tesora builds frontier AI agents for actuaries at P&C carriers, reinsurers, and MGAs. The agents handle the assembly, pulling the data, running the method, and deploying the rater, while you review the work and make every call. We deploy inside the stack you already run, on your infra and under your IT team's control, with no shared servers and nothing to rip out. Your data never trains our models, or anyone else's. We treat this as a partnership so we stay hands-on until the work is live and holding up in production. That standard runs through our security posture too: SOC 2 Type II certified, with a full audit trail behind every change. The part of the job that matters is actuarial judgment, and we automate everything around it so you get back to the work only you can do. Built by AI technologists and actuaries who want to see this exist and backed by Y Combinator & other top investors.
companies.story: 这是为财产险精算师打造前沿人工智能智能体的公司。假如你是一名精算师，每天要花大量时间从不同系统拉数据、跑模型、部署费率表，真正需要判断力的工作反而被挤占。Tesora 的智能体能自动完成数据装配、方法运行和费率部署，你只需审核和做决策。它部署在你的基础设施上，数据不会用于训练任何模型，并且通过了 SOC 2 Type II 认证。这家公司来自 YC 2025 年夏季批次，团队四人，正在招聘，由人工智能技术专家和精算师共同打造。

companies.name: BootLoop
companies.originalOneLiner: Firmware in minutes, not months - rigorously tested on real hardware
companies.originalDescription: BootLoop is building the first AI agent to write and test firmware on real hardware. Existing AI coding assistants fail completely with embedded systems, but our agent ingests datasheets, schematics, and other design files to write firmware in your style and automatically test it on your hardware.
companies.story: 这家公司切的是嵌入式固件开发，一个现有编码助手完全失效的领域。想象你是一名嵌入式工程师，拿到一块新芯片，要读几百页数据手册、画原理图、写底层驱动，再连上真实硬件反复调试。BootLoop 的智能体能自动消化数据手册和设计文件，按你的风格编写固件，并在真实硬件上自动测试。它来自 YC 2025 年夏季批次，团队三人，正在招聘，让固件开发从数月缩短到几分钟。

companies.name: Prototyping.io
companies.originalOneLiner: Autonomous manufacturing for mechanical parts
companies.originalDescription: Prototyping.io turns CAD designs into real mechanical parts through an AI-driven manufacturing system. We analyze designs for manufacturability and automate production workflows to deliver high-quality parts faster and at lower cost.
companies.story: 这是一家做机械零件自主制造的公司。想象你是一名产品设计师，刚在 CAD 软件里完成一个精密零件，接下来要找人报价、等排期、反复沟通可制造性，一拖就是几周。Prototyping.io 的人工智能系统能自动分析设计是否适合制造，并驱动生产流程直接做出实物零件，更快也更便宜。它来自 YC 2026 年春季批次，团队两人，正在招聘，正在把从图纸到零件的路径压缩到极致。

companies.name: ANORIA
companies.originalOneLiner: The first wearable that reads your emotions to enhance your EQ.
companies.originalDescription: We've spent decades tracking everything. Sleep. Recovery. Steps. All proxies for how we feel. Performance is 90% mental. And yet no one has built the feedback loop for our emotions. We close that loop by designing a device that understands how you feel, tells you why, and what you can do about it. Emotional intelligence becomes trainable, so you can better connect and create with those around you.
companies.story: 这是一款能读懂你情绪的可穿戴设备，不只是又一个记步数的手环。想象你刚结束一场紧张的会议，心里很烦躁但说不清原因，手环告诉你此刻的情绪状态、触发因素，甚至给出调节建议。ANORIA 把情绪识别从实验室带到了你的手腕上，它通过传感器和算法分析生理信号，让你像训练体能一样训练情商。它来自 YC 2026 年春季批次，团队五人，正在招聘，它之所以不是手机应用，是因为只有贴身佩戴的传感器才能实时捕捉那些你自己都未必意识到的情绪波动。

companies.name: Adialante
companies.originalOneLiner: Cancer screening without barriers
companies.originalDescription: We know how to improve cancer outcomes by 8x-10x: you catch it early. MRI is the most robust and powerful cancer-detection tool in the world, yet systems cost millions to purchase, take months to install, and require high levels of technical skill to operate. We've redesigned MRI from the ground up with new physics, algorithms, and hardware, all to bring cancer screening to the entire world. Our mobile MRI is an imaging clinic on wheels. No equipment to buy, no infrastructure needed. For a flat per-scan fee, any medical site can offer MRI cancer screening. Starting with prostate cancer. Then everything else.
companies.story: 这是一家重新设计磁共振成像系统的公司，目标是让癌症筛查普及到全世界。想象你是一家社区诊所的运营负责人，想给患者提供核磁共振筛查，但设备动辄上千万、安装要数月、操作需要专业技师。Adialante 从物理原理、算法到硬件全部重新设计，做出了一个移动核磁共振车，按次收费，无需购买设备。它来自 YC 2026 年春季批次，团队四人，正在招聘，先从前列腺癌开始，再扩展到其他癌症。

companies.name: Friend
companies.originalOneLiner: A wearable AI companion device.
companies.originalDescription: Friend is building a small wearable device around always-available companionship, voice interaction, and a different style of consumer AI interface.
companies.story: 这家公司做的是一个可以全天佩戴的人工智能伴侣设备，不是手机应用，而是一个独立的硬件。想象你是一个经常感到孤独或者需要随时有人聊聊的普通人，你不想掏出手机打开应用，而是希望有个小东西挂在身上，随时可以自然对话。Friend 把语音交互和陪伴感做进了一个小巧的穿戴设备里，它来自智能硬件观察名单，代表了一种不同于屏幕的消费级人工智能交互方向。

companies.name: ZooData
companies.originalOneLiner: The data layer for AI agents
companies.originalDescription: The data layer for AI agents
companies.story: 这是一家为人工智能智能体提供数据基础设施的公司。想象你是一个正在构建智能体应用的开发者，你的智能体需要从各种网站和接口获取结构化数据，但每次都要自己写爬虫、处理反爬、清洗格式，非常繁琐。ZooData 提供了一个统一的数据层，让智能体像调用数据库一样获取实时、干净的外部数据。它出现在 Product Hunt 上，代表了智能体生态里一个关键的基础设施层。

companies.name: PixyCAD
companies.originalOneLiner: Fast & precise 3D CAD built natively for iPad and Mac
companies.originalDescription: Fast & precise 3D CAD built natively for iPad and Mac
companies.story: 这是一款原生运行在 iPad 和 Mac 上的三维 CAD 软件，强调快速和精确。想象你是一名工业设计师，出差时客户突然要改一个零件尺寸，你不想打开笨重的笔记本电脑，而是直接掏出 iPad，用手指或笔就能完成精确的三维建模。PixyCAD 利用苹果设备的触控和性能优势，把专业 CAD 带到了移动端。它出现在 Product Hunt 上，代表了专业设计工具向便携设备迁移的趋势。

companies.name: OpenMarkdown
companies.originalOneLiner: A markdown editor you and your agent co-edit
companies.originalDescription: A markdown editor you and your agent co-edit
companies.story: 这是一个你和人工智能智能体可以共同编辑的 Markdown 编辑器。想象你是一个经常写技术文档或笔记的开发者，你习惯用 Markdown 记录思路，同时希望人工智能智能体能帮你补充内容、修正错误或整理结构。OpenMarkdown 让智能体和你在同一个文档里实时协作，就像两个人一起写一份笔记。它出现在 Product Hunt 上，代表了人类与智能体协作写作的新交互方式。

readings.title: RICE: Simple prioritization for product managers
readings.story: 产品经理每天面对一大堆需求，每个都有人催。团队开会时大家各执一词，谁都觉得自己手里的功能最重要。这时候，怎么选才不会后悔？Intercom 这篇讲 RICE 框架的文章，不是简单给个公式，而是把优先级从“谁嗓门大”变成“谁证据足”。它帮你把范围、影响力、信心和努力四个维度拆开，让争论有据可依。读的时候可以留意作者怎么定义“信心”这个软指标，以及他们如何处理那些数据不全的情况：这才是真正卡住团队的地方。

readings.title: What is Product-Led Growth?
readings.story: 你大概听过“产品驱动增长”这个词，但真正落地时，很多团队发现它不只是让用户免费试用那么简单。OpenView 这篇文章是 PLG 领域的经典入门，它解释了为什么有些产品不用销售追着用户跑，用户自己就会用起来、邀请同事、甚至主动付费。文章没有堆砌概念，而是从“产品本身如何成为增长引擎”这个根本问题出发。读的时候可以重点看作者如何区分 PLG 和传统销售模式，以及他们提到的那些“产品内增长循环”到底长什么样：这能帮你判断自己的产品是否适合这条路。

readings.title: Usability Testing
readings.story: 做产品的人几乎都听过可用性测试，但真到自己上手时，往往会卡在第一步：到底测什么、找谁测、测完怎么用结果？团队里有人觉得太麻烦，有人觉得测一次就够了，还有人拿到一堆问题却不知道先改哪个。这篇文章的好处在于，它不急着给标准答案，而是先帮你理清可用性测试到底解决什么问题、在什么阶段做最有效。读的时候可以留意作者怎么把“测试”这件事拆成几个可操作的步骤，以及他如何判断哪些细节值得花时间、哪些可以跳过。这样看完，你不仅能照做，还能自己调整出适合团队的测试方式。

companies.name: Overshoot
companies.originalOneLiner: AI Infra for real-time vision applications
companies.originalDescription: Overshoot makes it easy for developers to build and run real-time vision applications. AI can see and understand the physical world. This unlocks new applications in physical security, safety, gaming, robotics and general consumer products. Soon, video agents will watch your home and your pet when you’re away. However, existing platforms make it painful for developers to build these real-time applications. Slow inference. Limited model availability. Break at scale. Overshoot solves this. Today, 300+ developers connect live video feeds to the largest collection of Vision Language Models with 3 lines of code. And get responses in less than 200ms. 10x faster than any existing inference platform. Zero infra headache. Our moat is focus. Image and Video are fundamentally different modalities from text. By focusing on them, we are able to make strong technical leaps from codec, streaming protocols to inference engines. Younes and Zakaria are cousins. Zakaria graduated top of his class at LSE and MIT, and later built low-latency high-throughput pricing systems (surge) at Uber and inference engines at Meta. He previously built and sold a software product and won several prominent AI hackathons. Younes was a founding engineer at Cosmonio (later acquired by Intel). He built a training and serving Computer Vision platform from scratch. He witnessed firsthand customers abandoning traditional Computer Vision because it lacked the “general” intelligence LLMs have today. Together we’ve shipped large-scale systems and know where they break.
companies.story: 这是做实时视觉应用人工智能基础设施的公司。想象你是一个正在开发智能安防摄像头的工程师，你希望摄像头能实时识别异常行为，但现有的推理平台要么响应慢，要么支持的模型少，部署起来还容易崩溃。Overshoot 让你用三行代码就能接入大量视觉语言模型，并且响应时间不到 200 毫秒，比现有平台快十倍。它专注于图像和视频处理，在编解码和流媒体协议上做了深度优化。目前已有 300 多位开发者在使用，来自 YC 2026 冬季批次，团队 5 人，位于旧金山。

companies.name: Understudy Labs
companies.originalOneLiner: Effortlessly move to open weight models
companies.originalDescription: An open-source toolkit to capture traces, evaluate cheaper models against benchmarks, and ship specialist routes you own. Capture traces from LLM production workflows with a single install that deploys within coding agents you already use. Hosted infrastructure is optional. Evaluate the captured traces and set a benchmark for success. Every future model switch meets or exceeds it in A/B testing. Train and fine-tune a new model on prompts and weights you always own. Start locally and scale into cloud-hosted processes as you see success. Deploy a new model only when the held-out eval is beaten. Serve it wherever you want. Production data feeds back into training and compounds performance over time. Test. Learn. Deploy. Repeat.
companies.story: 这家公司做的是帮助团队从闭源模型迁移到开源权重模型的工具。假如你是公司的机器学习负责人，正在评估是否将生产中的大语言模型换成更便宜的开源模型，但担心性能下降、迁移成本高。Understudy Labs 提供了一个开源工具包，先捕获生产中的调用轨迹，设定基准，然后在新模型上线前通过 A/B 测试确保性能不低于现有模型。你可以在本地训练和微调，数据始终归你所有。它来自 YC 2026 夏季批次，团队 2 人，位于旧金山。

companies.name: Nex
companies.originalOneLiner: Turn manual workflows into AI agents
companies.originalDescription: Nex automates the messy business and GTM workflows that no tool could handle before, taking real actions across 1000+ integrations. Instead of just chatting, the agent writes code as it works to make workflows deterministic, fast, and cheap to re-run, and delivers real output: a Slack message, an opened PR, or a live structured data table. Built for teams.
companies.story: 这是把手动工作流变成智能体的自动化平台。假如你是销售主管，每天要花大量时间在客户关系系统、邮件和聊天工具之间来回操作，比如更新商机状态、发送跟进消息、生成报价单。Nex 的智能体会直接在你的工作流中写代码来执行这些操作，结果是一个真实的 Slack 消息、一个合并请求或一张结构化数据表。它集成了超过 1000 个应用，让流程确定、快速且可重复。来自 YC 2026 夏季批次，团队 5 人，位于旧金山。

companies.name: b12 Labs
companies.originalOneLiner: Making hard molecules for Pharma and Biotech
companies.originalDescription: b12 makes high-value molecules that are otherwise hard to make. We help pharma companies plan and make new drugs, accelerating early-stage drug discovery from years to months. Andres built the first AI agent that can autonomously think and make molecules in a robotic lab, published in Nature Machine Intelligence (1000+ citations), and won the best paper award at the NeurIPS AI for Science conference. Zlatko is a 3x National Chemistry Olympiad champion, competed at IChO level, and medicinal chemist who has worked at Roche and leading lab robotics companies. Combined, we have an extensive network of hundreds of chemists, automation scientists, and AI 4 Science researchers. We run paid pilots with big pharma companies, demonstrating that our platform planned a set of experiments that achieved full conversion in a single attempt, eliminating the iteration cycle.
companies.story: 这是用人工智能和机器人加速新药发现的公司。想象你是制药公司的药物化学家，正在为合成一种结构复杂的分子而苦恼，传统方法需要反复试错。b12 Labs 的智能体能在机器人实验室里自主思考和合成分子，将早期药物发现从几年缩短到几个月。他们的技术曾发表在《自然机器智能》上，并获得 NeurIPS 人工智能科学会议最佳论文奖。目前正在与大型制药公司进行付费试点，来自 YC 2025 夏季批次，团队 3 人，正在招聘。

companies.name: 9 Mothers
companies.originalOneLiner: Counter Drone Systems. $1.6m sales. We delivered for the DoW.
companies.originalDescription: We have sold $1.6m of systems to the DoW. Multiple systems delivered to the DoW. Our first product - EDDA - is a counter drone system - small, low power, low cost fully autonomous-capable. It's designed to be used on vehicles, bases, or carried - to stop group 1 suicide drones. We have multiple contracts, sales, etc. We have 3 more products with demand in various stages of development. More details at https://9mothers.com
companies.story: 这是做反无人机系统的公司，产品已经卖给美国国防部。想象你是军事基地的安全负责人，面对成群的小型自杀式无人机，你需要一种便携、低成本又能自主拦截的方案。9 Mothers 的 EDDA 系统体积小、功耗低，可安装在车辆、基地或随身携带，专门对付第一类无人机。他们已经交付了多套系统，销售额达到 160 万美元，还有三款产品正在开发中。来自 YC 2026 春季批次，团队 19 人，正在招聘。

companies.name: Arlo Industries
companies.originalOneLiner: Track drones and missiles without radars - Accurate, Passive, Scalable
companies.originalDescription: Arlo Industries is building a network of sensors that precisely tracks stealthy drones and aerial threats better than radars. This capability does not exist yet because traditional radars are built on past war doctrines designed to protect single, centralised assets. Modern warfare, however, demands wide-area, persistent coverage that is both passive and economically scalable. By utilising a mesh architecture, Arlo Industries unlocks unprecedented asymmetric economics. The network is fundamentally built to scale: the cost of adding sensors grows linearly, but the tracking accuracy increases exponentially, delivering highly resilient, persistent coverage for a fraction of the cost of legacy systems. Deo founded Arlo Industries after spending over 6 years in the Israeli defence ecosystem, where he lived through multiple conflicts and experienced the Iron Dome and other systems in action against ICBMs and the infamous Shahed drones. Learning exactly how these defence systems could be improved after a Shahed exploded close to his apartment, he built Arlo Industries around the core philosophy that conflict should be concise & precise. The people behind Arlo1 includes a PhD in drones and autonomy and military experts. Arlo Industries has actively showcased this technology directly to Ukrainian militaries on the frontlines, as well as to operators across Europe and the USA.
companies.story: 这是用无源传感器网络追踪无人机和导弹的公司，不依赖传统雷达。想象你是防空系统的指挥官，雷达很难发现低空慢速的小型无人机，而且造价高昂。Arlo Industries 部署大量低成本传感器组成网格，新增传感器的成本线性增长，但追踪精度指数级提升，实现广域、持续、隐蔽的覆盖。创始人曾在以色列国防领域工作六年，亲历过铁穹等系统的实战。来自 YC 2026 春季批次，团队 3 人，正在招聘。

companies.name: Basedash Suggestions
companies.originalOneLiner: Your AI data analyst, now with ideas of its own.
companies.originalDescription: Your AI data analyst, now with ideas of its own.
companies.story: 这是一个自带想法的人工智能数据分析工具。假如你是市场分析师，每天要面对海量数据，却不知道从哪里开始分析。Basedash Suggestions 不仅能回答你的问题，还会主动提出它认为有价值的分析方向，帮你发现隐藏的洞察。它来自 Product Hunt，适合需要快速从数据中获得启发的人。

companies.name: Aye
companies.originalOneLiner: Your teachable AI intern for everyday browser work
companies.originalDescription: Your teachable AI intern for everyday browser work
companies.story: 这是一款可教的人工智能助手，帮你完成日常浏览器操作。想象你是一个经常需要填写表单、整理网页信息或者重复点击的运营人员，Aye 可以学习你的操作步骤，然后自动执行。你就像带了一个实习生，教一遍它就能帮你干活。来自 Product Hunt。

companies.name: BrickSolvr
companies.originalOneLiner: Turn any 3D model into a buildable brick design
companies.originalDescription: Turn any 3D model into a buildable brick design
companies.story: 这是把任意三维模型转换成积木搭建图纸的设计工具。假如你是积木爱好者或玩具设计师，想把自己建模的汽车或建筑变成可拼搭的积木套装，BrickSolvr 会自动分析模型结构，生成合理的积木分解方案和拼装步骤。来自 Product Hunt。

companies.name: Halliday
companies.originalOneLiner: AI glasses that put lightweight information in the user's field of view.
companies.originalDescription: Halliday works on smart glasses that combine a small display, voice interaction, and assistant features for translation, reminders, and everyday information.
companies.story: 这是一款智能眼镜，把轻量信息投射到用户视野中，而不是像手机那样占用双手和视线。想象你正在参加国际会议，需要实时翻译对方的讲话，或者你在跑步时想看一眼导航。Halliday 的眼镜通过微型显示和语音交互，提供翻译、提醒和日常信息，让你不掏出手机就能获取。它不只是一个应用，而是把能力放进了眼镜这个随身设备里。来自智能硬件关注列表。

readings.title: Traction vs. Growth
readings.story: 很多团队在早期拼命做增长，却发现用户来了又走，根本留不住。这时候才意识到，增长不是一开始就该全力追求的事。Brian Balfour 这篇讲的就是“牵引力”和“增长”的区别：前者是找到产品与市场的匹配点，后者才是规模化。读的时候可以留意作者怎么判断一个团队是否真的准备好了，而不是被数据假象带着走。

readings.title: How to Start a Startup
readings.story: 创业这件事，听再多成功故事，轮到自己时还是不知道第一步该做什么。Y Combinator 这篇经典指南就是给这种迷茫准备的。它不讲大道理，而是从“该不该创业”开始，一步步拆解想法验证、团队搭建、产品迭代这些最实际的问题。读的时候可以重点看它怎么帮人把模糊的念头变成可执行的行动清单。

readings.title: Product Roadmaps
readings.story: 产品路线图听起来像是个计划工具，但大部分团队用着用着就变成了愿望清单，或者被需求压得动弹不得。Atlassian 这篇从敏捷开发的视角重新定义了路线图：它不是承诺，而是沟通和优先级的工具。读的时候可以学习它怎么区分“要做什么”和“为什么做”，以及如何让路线图真正帮团队对齐目标，而不是制造焦虑。

companies.name: Prized
companies.originalOneLiner: Lovable for internal tools
companies.originalDescription: Prized lets non-engineers build, deploy, and share secure internal tools with AI, no engineering required. You don't need to know where the data lives, what APIs to use, or which connectors you need. Just describe what you want (a customer lookup, a dashboard, an approval flow), and Prized builds the tool on top of the right company data inside a governed boundary. The people who feel the pain of missing internal tools most are non-engineers. They understand the workflow best but are blocked by the software layer, so they wait on engineering, duct-tape spreadsheets together, or increasingly rip company data into Claude Code and Cursor with no thought to permissions, sharing, or governance. Prized makes security the default, enforced in the infrastructure rather than left to whoever built the tool. Each tool gets access only to the tables and integrations it was explicitly granted, credentials are workspace-scoped so tools can't cross org boundaries, and outbound calls go through a controlled layer. As an employee builds and shares, a teammate forks it and re-points it at their own data, and over time the company builds up a library of governed tools it actually owns. Hudson was founding engineer at Gander (F24, acquired by Archer), then full-stack at Suno. Marinos studied CS and ME at Stanford and was on the same Gander team.
companies.story: Prized 是一家让非工程师也能用人工智能构建、部署和分享安全内部工具的公司。想象你是一个销售主管，每天要查客户数据、审批流程，但公司内部工具全靠工程团队开发，你只能排队等两周，或者用电子表格凑合，甚至把数据直接塞到 Claude Code 里，完全不考虑权限和合规。Prized 让你用自然语言描述想要什么，比如一个客户查询面板或一个审批流，它就能自动连接公司数据库，生成一个安全、可分享的工具。每个工具只访问被明确授权的表和接口，权限在基础设施层面强制执行，而不是靠使用者自觉。这家公司来自 YC 夏季 2026 批次，团队只有两人，但切中了非工程师的痛点，让懂业务的人自己造工具，不用再依赖工程资源。

companies.name: Alkera AI
companies.originalOneLiner: Reliable and safe data engineering and data science agents
companies.originalDescription: Alkera is a data engineering/analysis/science agent that works in your IDE or CLI. If you’re tired of agents that produce false, or even dangerous, reports about your data, then Alkera is for you. Our agent is equipped with your data’s history and lineage, your team’s knowledge, and tailored plugins for data apps such as Snowflake and dbt. Simply install and connect your services to begin doing trusted agentic data work. We also offer VPC & on-prem deployment options for when data can't leave your boundary.
companies.story: Alkera AI 是一个数据工程和分析智能体，运行在你的 IDE 或命令行里。假如你是一个数据工程师，每天被那些给出错误甚至危险报告的智能体搞得头疼，Alkera 能解决这个问题。它自带数据的历史和血缘、团队知识，以及针对 Snowflake、dbt 等工具的插件，你只需安装并连接服务，就能开始可信的智能体数据工作。它还支持 VPC 和本地部署，适合数据不能离开内网的环境。这家公司来自 YC 夏季 2026 批次，团队三人，专注于让数据智能体变得可靠安全，解决数据工程中信任缺失的痛点。

companies.name: CharacterQuilt
companies.originalOneLiner: Computer use agents to deploy enterprise marketing campaigns
companies.originalDescription: CharacterQuilt builds computer use agents to deploy enterprise marketing campaigns. Marketers today don’t actually do much marketing at all. Today, over 80% of time spent on launching a marketing campaign is actually ops work: tweaking automation flows in Pardot, configuring audiences in LinkedIn, or wiring HTML emails in Marketo. What’s crazy about enterprise marketing is companies pay agencies millions of dollars just to deploy campaigns in their systems — and they still have to wait weeks for each one. CharacterQuilt is AI infrastructure for marketing teams: a brain that learns your brand, and agents that operate your existing tools. Marketing campaigns that used to take 3 agencies, 10 tools, and 6 weeks are now being built, designed, and deployed from CQ in an hour. Customers submit a brief like they would send to a human teammate or marketing agency, and they get back fully designed and deployed campaigns. Teams like 1upHealth, ABC Fitness, and Emplifi use us to: 1-) Build segments/audiences faster 2-) Create on-brand creative (AI is terrible at staying on-brand) 3-) Deploy campaigns automatically into HubSpot, WordPress, LinkedIn etc. We replicate your brand guidelines, deeply understand past campaigns, and work inside your systems. If you run demand gen or lifecycle at a B2B/B2C company and want to ship campaigns faster, send us a brief and we’ll build it in 15 minutes.
companies.story: CharacterQuilt 构建能使用电脑的智能体，用来部署企业营销活动。想象你是一个营销经理，80% 的时间都花在调整 Pardot 的自动化流程、在 LinkedIn 配置受众、在 Marketo 里拼接 HTML 邮件上，根本没空做真正的营销。企业付给代理公司几百万美元，结果一个活动还要等几周。CharacterQuilt 是营销团队的人工智能基础设施：一个学习你品牌的“大脑”，加上操作现有工具的智能体。你提交一个简报，就像发给人类同事或代理公司那样，一小时后就能收到完整设计好的活动。这家公司来自 YC 春季 2026 批次，团队四人，把原本需要三个代理、十个工具、六周的工作压缩到一小时。

companies.name: Intelligence Factory
companies.originalOneLiner: Human Intelligence for Robots
companies.originalDescription: Robotics is the new paradigm. With hardware converging, Intelligence is the biggest bottleneck. Our world was built for humans and we're giving robots the ability to reason and act like us. The way we learn any task - by seeing, doing, and feeling - is how we train robots. We're building general intelligence that works on any robot and fits seamlessly within our world.
companies.story: Intelligence Factory 给机器人提供人类级别的智能。如果你是一个机器人研发负责人，你会发现硬件越来越趋同，但智能才是最大瓶颈。这个世界是为人类建造的，而这家公司让机器人能像人一样推理和行动：通过看、做、感觉来学习任务。他们正在构建通用智能，能适配任何机器人，无缝融入人类环境。这家公司来自 YC 春季 2026 批次，团队五人，正在招聘，方向是机器人通用智能，解决机器人从实验室走向真实世界的核心难题。

companies.name: Synphony
companies.originalOneLiner: robots & software for farms
companies.originalDescription: Strawberry farming is a $3B industry in California alone with 60% labor cost using 40-year old software. Synphony provides strawberry picking robots and software services including: bed-level analytics, data pipeline integration, and agentic solutions. Synphony's "side hustle" is selling data, evals, and viral demos to robot foundation labs while building capacity for general robot deployments. We've started with strawberry farming for great margins and outdoor data moat, but also received requests for robots in semi-conductors and autonomous space labs. Synphony's team has won over 15 hackathons together (taking home 4 Jensen-signed GPUs!). Sean did ML research at NVIDIA and led AI products used by IRS and Citibank. Lucas' research spanned robotics, IoT devices, and neuromorphic computing. Alex architected an app with 400k users.
companies.story: Synphony 为农场提供机器人和软件。想象你是一个草莓农场主，加州草莓产业价值 30 亿美元，但 60% 成本是人工，软件还停留在 40 年前。Synphony 提供草莓采摘机器人，以及床级分析、数据管道集成和智能体解决方案。他们还把数据和评估卖给机器人基础模型实验室，同时收到半导体和太空实验室的机器人需求。团队在超过 15 场黑客马拉松中获胜，拿过四块黄仁勋签名的 GPU。这家公司来自 YC 春季 2026 批次，团队十人，从草莓采摘切入，但技术可扩展到通用机器人部署。

companies.name: Prana
companies.originalOneLiner: An AI primary care doctor in your pocket
companies.originalDescription: Prana replaces the reactive, 15-minute annual physical with continuous, proactive care. We connect to your medical records and wearables to watch for "clinical drift," catching subtle declines in health that human doctors miss between visits. Most AI health apps are just chatbots. Prana is a full-stack medical provider. Our AI acts as a always-on physician that watches your data, explains your labs, and manages your prescriptions. Safety & Scale: We automate 90% of the "grunt work" (history taking, logistics, triage) so our human doctors can focus purely on high-leverage decisions. This allows us to offer 24/7 physician care for a fraction of the cost of traditional care. The Team: - Meer Patel (CEO): JHU BME. Deferred Brown Medical School to build Prana because code scales better than appointments. - Vishvam Rawal (CTO): Ex-Quant. Building high-frequency data infrastructure for health signals. - Sanjit Menon (CHO): Graduating MD Candidate. Deep clinical expertise to ensure our models practice good medicine. Traction: Live in beta with early users.
companies.story: Prana 是一个放在口袋里的全科医生。想象你是一个忙碌的上班族，每年只有一次 15 分钟的体检，平时身体的小变化医生根本注意不到。Prana 连接你的医疗记录和可穿戴设备，持续监测“临床漂移”，捕捉医生在问诊间隙错过的健康细微下滑。它不是聊天机器人，而是一个完整的医疗服务提供者：人工智能充当始终在线的医生，查看数据、解释化验结果、管理处方。它自动化 90% 的“苦力活”，让人类医生专注于关键决策，从而以传统医疗几分之一的成本提供 24/7 服务。这家公司来自 YC 冬季 2026 批次，团队四人，CEO 是约翰霍普金斯大学生物医学工程背景，推迟了布朗大学医学院录取来创业。

companies.name: In Parallel MCP
companies.originalOneLiner: Your context, available to every agent.
companies.originalDescription: Your context, available to every agent.
companies.story: In Parallel MCP 是一个让你上下文能被每个智能体访问的工具。想象你是一个开发者，同时使用多个智能体，每个都要重新告诉它你的项目和偏好，非常低效。In Parallel MCP 把你的上下文统一起来，让所有智能体都能共享，省去重复配置。这个产品来自 Product Hunt，虽然团队和融资信息不多，但解决的是智能体协作中的真实痛点，值得关注。

companies.name: ChikitAI
companies.originalOneLiner: Agentic AI for Healthcare Triage and Care Automation
companies.originalDescription: Agentic AI for Healthcare Triage and Care Automation
companies.story: ChikitAI 是一个用于医疗分诊和护理自动化的智能体系统。想象你是一个诊所的运营负责人，每天要处理大量患者问诊和分诊，人工效率低且容易出错。ChikitAI 用智能体自动完成分诊和护理流程，减轻医护负担。这个产品来自 Product Hunt，属于医疗健康领域，虽然没有公开的融资或团队规模，但切中了医疗自动化的需求。

companies.name: Even Realities
companies.originalOneLiner: Smart glasses focused on daily information, translation, and lightweight assistance.
companies.originalDescription: Even Realities makes smart glasses that try to be closer to normal eyewear while adding translation, navigation, and personal information features.
companies.story: Even Realities 做的是智能眼镜，但不像手机应用那样依赖屏幕，而是把信息投射到镜片上，让你正常佩戴的同时获取翻译、导航和日常信息。想象你是一个经常出差的商务人士，需要即时翻译和导航，又不想掏出手机。Even Realities 的眼镜外观接近普通眼镜，重量轻，续航长，把能力放在眼镜这个随身设备里，而不是手机应用。它来自智能硬件观察名单，虽然没有公开融资细节，但代表了增强现实眼镜向实用化发展的方向。

companies.name: Scribble Party
companies.originalOneLiner: A local-first whiteboard studio for teachers and creators
companies.originalDescription: A local-first whiteboard studio for teachers and creators
companies.story: Scribble Party 是一个本地优先的白板工作室，专为教师和创作者设计。想象你是一个老师，上课时想画图讲解，但在线白板工具要么延迟高，要么依赖网络。Scribble Party 把数据存在本地，响应快，支持多人协作，适合教学和创意工作。这个产品来自 Product Hunt，虽然团队和融资未公开，但本地优先的设计解决了网络依赖问题，对教育场景很有价值。

readings.title: Retention Analysis
readings.story: 做产品的人几乎都会盯着留存率看，但真正用好留存分析的人不多。很多人打开后台看到一条下滑曲线就慌了，却说不清用户到底在哪一步离开了。这篇文章好在哪里？它不急着给答案，而是先帮你理清留存分析到底在问什么问题：是用户没回来，还是回来却没做关键行为？读的时候可以留意作者怎么把抽象指标拆成具体场景，比如区分新用户和活跃用户的留存、选择合适的时间窗口。这些细节往往决定了分析是帮你看清方向，还是让你更困惑。

readings.title: The ultimate guide to onboarding
readings.story: 一个新用户第一次打开产品，几秒钟后就关掉了。这种场景每个团队都遇到过，但 onboarding 这件事远不止做个新手引导。团队往往在功能太多和太少之间摇摆，在教用户和让用户自己探索之间拿不准。这篇来自 Intercom 的文章能帮你跳出这些具体选择，看到 onboarding 背后更根本的问题：用户到底在哪个时刻觉得产品值得继续用下去。读的时候可以留意作者是怎么把抽象的用户心理拆成可执行的步骤的，尤其是他判断优先级的标准是什么。

readings.title: How Figma builds product
readings.story: 一个产品团队从几个人长到几百人，沟通和决策方式会自然变复杂。很多公司在这个过程中丢失了最初的敏捷和共识，但 Figma 似乎没有。这篇文章讲的就是他们怎么做到的。读的时候可以特别关注他们如何处理跨角色的协作：设计师、工程师、产品经理之间那些容易模糊的边界，他们是用什么具体机制来保持清晰的。

companies.name: Operon
companies.originalOneLiner: Agentic data layer for manufacturing & process industries.
companies.originalDescription: Operon is the data intelligence layer for heavy industry. We ingest the messy documents a plant runs on (P&IDs, schematics, datasheets, scans) and turn them into one structured, queryable model of the facility. On top of it, engineers query their plant in natural language and build agentic workflows for safety, compliance, and design.
companies.story: 这家公司为制造和流程工业打造智能数据层。想象你是一家化工厂的工程负责人，每天要处理大量管道仪表图、设备手册和扫描件，这些文档格式混乱、互不关联，找一个关键参数往往要翻半天。Operon 把这些零散资料整合成一个结构化的工厂数字模型，你直接用自然语言提问就能得到答案，还能在上面搭建安全合规或设计优化的智能工作流。它来自 YC 夏季 2026 批次，正在招聘，切的是工业数据基础设施这个巨大空白。

companies.name: Manicule
companies.originalOneLiner: AgentRel — Devrel For Agents
companies.originalDescription: Manicule does AgentRel. We get companies discovered and used by AI agents. Think DevRel, rebuilt for a world where agents make all the decisions. We own developer documentation and technical content across social channels, end-to-end. We've grown 100% MoM over the last three months to $53K in monthly revenue, with customers like Supermemory, Greptile, Reducto, and Mastra. Getting discovered and used by agents is its own job now, and the market for it is broken. The SEO/GEO SaaS tools just show you data like where you rank in AI answers. The agencies are slow and lack know-how with agents. The one person who could own all of it end-to-end, a DevRel, is nearly impossible to hire: our customers have had roles open for months at $300K+ and still can't find anyone good. We solve all these gaps. Naman has been doing fractional DevRel since he was 13, working with companies like PromptLayer, Brightdata, and Courier.com. Shreyans has been building since 14 — he built an AI app that hit App Store Productivity Trending within a month, and was the founding engineer at Supermemory. We met in high school and have built multiple startups together since.
companies.story: 这是做智能体开发者关系的公司。假如你是一家人工智能公司的产品负责人，你发现自己的接口文档和内容需要被智能体发现和使用，但传统的搜索引擎优化工具只告诉你排名，代理公司又不懂智能体生态，而招一个专职开发者关系工程师要花三十万美元以上还找不到合适的人。Manicule 提供端到端的智能体开发者关系服务，从文档撰写到社交媒体内容全部包办，已经服务了 Supermemory、Greptile 等客户，月收入达到五万三千美元且每月增长一倍。它来自 YC 春季 2026 批次，团队五人，正在招聘。

companies.name: Superset
companies.originalOneLiner: Building the platform for software factories
companies.originalDescription: Superset is an open-source IDE that helps engineers run 100s of coding agents in parallel. Our desktop app is loved by tens of thousands of engineers, and we're scaling out our effort to build a collaborative, cross-platform tool to allow users to code anywhere.
companies.story: 这家公司为软件工厂打造协作平台。如果你是一名工程师，正在同时运行上百个编码智能体，你会需要一个强大的集成开发环境来管理它们。Superset 的开源桌面应用已经获得数万工程师喜爱，它让你能并行调度大量智能体，并正在构建跨平台的协作工具，让你在任何地方都能写代码。它来自 YC 春季 2026 批次，团队三人，正在招聘。

companies.name: Telemetron
companies.originalOneLiner: Support and Operations Platform for Hardware Companies
companies.originalDescription: Telemetron is an AI-powered support platform tailored for hardware products (medical devices, consumer electronics, industrial hardware, robotics, and more). Our platform unifies ticketing, device diagnostics, order tracking, and product documentation into one intelligent system. Our AI agents connect directly to devices, APIs, and backend systems to deliver faster resolutions, smarter routing, and better support experiences.
companies.story: 这家公司为硬件企业打造人工智能支持平台。想象你是医疗设备公司的售后负责人，每天要处理大量客户报修、设备故障和退换货请求，数据分散在工单系统、设备日志和产品文档里，查找起来非常低效。Telemetron 把这些信息统一到一个智能平台，人工智能代理直接连接设备接口和后台系统，自动诊断问题、分配工单，让支持体验更快更智能。它来自 YC 秋季 2025 批次，团队两人，正在招聘。

companies.name: KelAI
companies.originalOneLiner: The AI Quant: Autonomous Alpha Engine for Funds and Traders.
companies.originalDescription: Founded by former WorldQuant portfolio manager & head of event driven systematic strategies Jeremie Cohen, KelAI is building the autonomous alpha engine for hedge funds, traders and institutional investors. Investment teams now have more data, tools and compute than ever, but research still runs across siloed systems and inefficient workflows. KelAI turns that fragmented process into a compounding AI-native engine that continuously finds, tests and validates trading signals at a pace no human team can match.
companies.story: 这家公司为对冲基金和交易员构建自主量化引擎。假设你是一家基金的研究主管，团队每天面对海量数据、工具和计算资源，但研究流程分散在多个系统里，效率低下。KelAI 把这个碎片化过程变成一个人工智能驱动的自动化引擎，持续发现、测试和验证交易信号，速度远超任何人类团队。创始人曾是 WorldQuant 的投资组合经理，公司来自 YC 春季 2026 批次，团队三人，正在招聘。

companies.name: Arctic Health
companies.originalOneLiner: AI-native credentialing and contracting for healthcare
companies.originalDescription: Arctic Health is building AI-native credentialing and contracting for healthcare organizations. We automate the full workflow, from establishing payer contracts to enrolling each provider. We collect and validate organization and provider data according to each state and payer’s requirements, and submit on the organization's behalf. We then monitor status and compliance on an ongoing basis. Tools on the market today either perform small pieces of the workflow or price out small and mid-sized organizations. We handle the process end-to-end regardless of organization type or size. Our browser automations enable AI agents to submit and monitor across hundreds of payer portals, and our system is trained by experienced industry experts who handle every edge case. Healthcare organizations get one simple platform. We handle the rest.
companies.story: 这家公司为医疗机构打造人工智能原生的资质认证和合同管理平台。想象你是一家小型诊所的运营负责人，每次与保险公司签约、为医生申请行医资质都要填写大量表格，不同州和保险公司的要求各不相同，手动操作极易出错且进度缓慢。Arctic Health 的智能体通过浏览器自动化在数百个保险门户上提交和跟踪申请，由行业专家训练处理各种边缘情况，让医疗机构用一个简单平台就能完成全部流程。它来自 YC 春季 2026 批次，团队四人。

companies.name: Based Hardware
companies.originalOneLiner: Open wearable AI hardware for builders.
companies.originalDescription: Based Hardware focuses on wearable AI devices and developer-friendly hardware kits for people experimenting with always-on personal assistants.
companies.story: 这家公司做可穿戴人工智能硬件，面向开发者和极客。它不只是一个手机应用，而是把智能助手放进眼镜、挂件等随身设备里，让你随时唤醒、无需掏手机。想象你是一个喜欢自己动手的硬件爱好者，想实验全天候的个人助理，但市面上的产品要么封闭要么太贵。Based Hardware 提供开放、可编程的硬件套件，让你能自由定制功能。它来自智能硬件观察清单，值得关注是因为可穿戴人工智能设备正在成为下一个计算平台。

companies.name: Inbix
companies.originalOneLiner: Cloudflare-native Email Infrastructure for Developers
companies.originalDescription: Cloudflare-native Email Infrastructure for Developers
companies.story: 这家公司为开发者提供基于 Cloudflare 的电子邮件基础设施。想象你是一名全栈开发者，正在给应用添加邮件发送功能，但配置邮件服务器、处理送达率和反垃圾邮件策略非常繁琐。Inbix 让你用 Cloudflare 原生服务快速搭建可靠邮件系统，省去运维麻烦。它出现在 Product Hunt 上，适合需要简单邮件方案的个人开发者和小团队。

companies.name: Codex Micro
companies.originalOneLiner: Tactile controls for your Codex agents
companies.originalDescription: Tactile controls for your Codex agents
companies.story: 这家公司为 Codex 智能体提供触觉控制工具。想象你正在用 Codex 编写代码，但智能体执行时你只能看不能干预，遇到错误要等它跑完才能调整。Codex Micro 让你在智能体运行过程中实时暂停、修改指令或重新定向，像给自动驾驶加了一个方向盘。它出现在 Product Hunt 上，适合希望更精细控制编码智能体的开发者。

companies.name: Verse
companies.originalOneLiner: Build and hire autonomous AI employees from a single prompt
companies.originalDescription: Build and hire autonomous AI employees from a single prompt
companies.story: 这家公司让你通过一个提示就能构建和雇佣自主人工智能员工。想象你是一家初创公司的创始人，需要快速组建一个虚拟团队来处理客服、数据录入或内容生成，但招聘和管理真人既贵又慢。Verse 让你用自然语言描述任务，系统自动生成多个智能体员工并分配工作。它出现在 Product Hunt 上，适合希望用人工智能替代重复劳动的小企业主。

readings.title: Shape Up: Betting
readings.story: 很多团队在定计划时容易陷入两难：既想要灵活，又怕失控。Basecamp 的 Shape Up 方法就是为这个矛盾而生的。这篇讲的是它里面“下注”这个环节，也就是团队怎么决定接下来做什么。读的时候可以留意作者如何把抽象的选择问题变成具体的判断框架，比如怎样设定时间盒、怎样评估一个想法是否值得投入。这些细节往往比结论更有用。

readings.title: What is a North Star Metric?
readings.story: 产品指标多到让人眼花缭乱，但真正能指引方向的往往只有一个。Amplitude 这篇讲的就是如何找到那个“北极星指标”。它不只是一篇定义文章，而是帮你理解为什么有些指标能带动增长，有些只是数字游戏。读的时候可以关注作者怎么区分好的和坏的指标，以及如何避免选了一个看似漂亮却无法指导行动的指标。

readings.title: Vanta's Path to Product-Market Fit
readings.story: 产品市场匹配听起来像是一个里程碑，但真正经历过的人知道它更像一个反复摸索的过程。Vanta 这家公司的故事特别适合用来理解这一点：他们早期花了很多时间跟客户聊，而不是埋头写代码。读的时候可以看看他们是怎么从错误的假设里转出来的，以及他们如何一步步确认客户真正愿意为什么事情付钱。这些细节比任何定义都更能说明问题。

companies.name: Minicor
companies.originalOneLiner: Scalable windows desktop automations
companies.originalDescription: Minicor connects AI startups to legacy desktop apps that have no API. Reliably, quickly and at scale. Describe a workflow and get an API endpoint. Each call triggers a self-healing desktop automation on a Windows VM. On-prem, cloud, or Citrix. Build through your coding agent via our MCP. Complete with the observability tools to manage your customer relationship: full video replay of every automation, granular logging, and slack enabled alerts.
companies.story: 企业里的智能体一旦在生产环境里出错，麻烦常常不是“它错了”，而是没人能重建当时的状态。Minicor 想给团队一个安全的调试环境，把失败现场重新搭出来。 它值得先记下来，不是因为有漂亮标签，而是因为 公开来源 让我们能看到一个正在公开发布或被讨论的新产品。

companies.name: Arzana
companies.originalOneLiner: The autonomous ERP for every manufacturer
companies.originalDescription: Arzana trains custom models on a factory's historical data and use them to deploy agents that automate their quoting, order entry, invoicing, and other repetitive office work. We've saved our customers over $1M in avoided staff costs. In the future, we'll expand into shop-floor automation, sending instructions to machinery and robots to produce the orders that our office agents processed. By 2035, we aim to fully automate 10,000 American factories.
companies.story: 工业现场的难点通常不在概念，而在机器能不能稳定适应真实环境。Arzana 想把原本靠人反复试错的一段做得更可复制。 它值得先记下来，不是因为有漂亮标签，而是因为 公开来源 让我们能看到一个正在公开发布或被讨论的新产品。

companies.name: HyperProbe
companies.originalOneLiner: Your coding agent writes code. Now let it fix prod too.
companies.originalDescription: If your team uses Cursor, Claude Code, or Codex to ship, you've felt it: the AI is great at writing code, mediocre at debugging it. When something breaks in prod, you're back to grepping logs, adding console.logs, redeploying, and hoping the AI's guess is right. HyperProbe fixes this. Your coding agent dynamically drops non-breaking probes into your running services, straight from your IDE. When a probe fires, HyperProbe captures and sanitises the exact variable state, feeding your agent real evidence instead of flat logs. This fixes prod incidents in minutes from the exact same window where agents write code, without ever redeploying to add a print statement. Under 1% CPU overhead. Automatic PII redaction. Built for backend teams shipping AI-written code today. Install in 60 seconds, see your first investigation in 10 minutes. That's why we call HyperProbe the runtime data layer for AI-native software.
companies.story: 工程团队不缺新工具，缺的是能减少等待和返工的工具。HyperProbe 如果能让一个复杂环节更可靠，就有机会嵌进日常开发流程。 它值得先记下来，不是因为有漂亮标签，而是因为 公开来源 让我们能看到一个正在公开发布或被讨论的新产品。

companies.name: Insurf
companies.originalOneLiner: The AI-Native Decision Infrastructure for Health Insurance
companies.originalDescription: Insurf is the AI-native data and decision layer for health insurance. Our first product, Inveto, automatically turns denied healthcare claims into source-cited, physician-attested appeals, recovering revenue practices lose today. Every claim it resolves builds the coverage-decision graph, the proprietary dataset of real payer behavior that powers our next product, Surely, which prices the true cost of a health plan for employers and brokers.
companies.story: 医疗团队每天都在和信息断点打交道，病人、保险、排班、账单和随访常常不在同一个地方。Insurf 想把其中一段流程变得更顺。 它值得先记下来，不是因为有漂亮标签，而是因为 公开来源 让我们能看到一个正在公开发布或被讨论的新产品。

companies.name: Mount
companies.originalOneLiner: The AI Agent Insurance Carrier
companies.originalDescription: TLDR: Mount is building the AI insurance carrier, starting with liability coverage for deployed AI agents. As everyone moves AI Agents into production and gives them more responsibility, we help businesses insure and secure them. Whenever responsibility shifts from human operators to autonomous systems, so too does the liability that accompanies it. The systems also introduce new risks: agentic software failures, prompt injection attacks, autonomous workflow errors, data leaks, and more. Legacy insurance was not built for this. Existing policies are often silent, ambiguous, or exclude autonomous software, and traditional insurers lack the data and technical capability to assess deployed AI Systems. Our first product, the Mount AI Liability Policy, is built for mid-market and enterprise companies deploying autonomous AI agents in real business processes. We scan and red-team AI deployments, quantify operational risk, help fix vulnerabilities, and insure the residual risk with purpose-built AI liability coverage. Mount is best thought of as a highly automated version of today's commercial insurance carriers, which run on manual workflows, layers of intermediaries, and tens of thousands of employees. AI enables automation of underwriting, pricing, policy issuance, claims, fraud detection, customer support, and distribution. We believe that the best way to use this opportunity is to rebuild those processes from the ground up.
companies.story: 金融和保险里的很多工作并不是缺人判断，而是材料太散、规则太多、过程还必须可追溯。Mount 想把这类判断前的准备工作自动化。 它值得先记下来，不是因为有漂亮标签，而是因为 公开来源 让我们能看到一个正在公开发布或被讨论的新产品。

companies.name: Huscarl
companies.originalOneLiner: AI-native actuary enabling self-insurance for corporations
companies.originalDescription: Huscarl is building an autonomous AI actuary to enable self-insurance for corporations. Large companies use insurance subsidiaries ("captives") to self-insure their risks. Some of these captives are larger than regional insurers. We provide them the actuarial and modeling layer to operate and grow. We're building a future where self-insurance is the default, and commercial insurance the exception. This is the best way to solve the inefficiencies of the $1T corporate insurance market.
companies.story: 金融和保险里的很多工作并不是缺人判断，而是材料太散、规则太多、过程还必须可追溯。Huscarl 想把这类判断前的准备工作自动化。 这里没有 YC 批次或团队人数这类整齐字段，所以更应该看产品本身和来源信号；今天的信号主要来自 公开来源。

companies.name: Rabbit
companies.originalOneLiner: A pocket AI device designed around voice, camera, and task assistance.
companies.originalDescription: Rabbit builds a dedicated AI hardware device that lets people ask questions, use the camera, and try lightweight assistant workflows without opening a phone app.
companies.story: 如果你每天开很多会、通勤、运动或到处见人，很多重要信息其实发生在电脑屏幕外。手机应用要你主动打开，但Rabbit 想把人工智能能力放进一个可以随身使用的设备里，让录音、提醒、健康记录或日常信息不只停留在手机应用里。 它被放进今天的列表，是因为它出现在 Smart hardware watchlist 这类公开来源里，至少说明有人正在把这个产品推到市场面前。

companies.name: Review by Eddie AI
companies.originalOneLiner: Time-stamped feedback on your video from your team. And AI.
companies.originalDescription: Time-stamped feedback on your video from your team. And AI.
companies.story: 这是一家做视频协作反馈工具的公司。想象你是一个创意团队的负责人，刚完成一支广告片的粗剪，需要收集导演、文案和客户的意见。过去你只能靠邮件来回或开会时口头点评，很容易遗漏细节。Review by Eddie AI 让团队成员直接在视频时间轴上打点留言，还能借助人工智能生成摘要和建议。它把散乱的反馈变成结构化、可追溯的清单，让修改过程不再混乱。这家公司刚在 Product Hunt 上发布，适合那些每天要处理大量视频审阅的团队。

companies.name: Velo 3.0
companies.originalOneLiner: AI video infrastructure to explain, train, and sell faster.
companies.originalDescription: AI video infrastructure to explain, train, and sell faster.
companies.story: 开发者工具的价值常常藏在少踩坑里。团队要交付业务功能，但会被集成、权限、调试和部署拖住。Velo 3.0 想把其中一段基础工作做薄。 这里没有 YC 批次或团队人数这类整齐字段，所以更应该看产品本身和来源信号；今天的信号主要来自 Product Hunt。

companies.name: Agnost AI
companies.originalOneLiner: YC S26) – Extract user feedback from agent conversations
companies.originalDescription: YC S26) – Extract user feedback from agent conversations
companies.story: 有些公司一开始并不容易一句话讲清，因为它们不是在做新入口，而是在重做某个后台流程。Agnost AI 想把一段原本分散的工作收紧。 它值得先记下来，不是因为有漂亮标签，而是因为 Launch HN 让我们能看到一个正在公开发布或被讨论的新产品。

readings.title: Outcomes Are Hard
readings.story: 很多团队习惯了按功能交付来考核，老板问“这个季度做了什么”，大家列出一堆上线特性。但真正有价值的是产品是否改变了用户行为或业务指标，这就是从“产出”转向“结果”。可一旦开始追求结果，就会发现阻力重重：数据口径对不上、实验周期太长、团队不敢砍需求。这篇来自 SVPG 的文章，正是讲为什么这条路这么难走，以及团队在切换思维时最常卡在哪几个环节。读的时候可以留意作者如何区分“困难”和“不可能”，以及他给出的那些小切口建议：哪些是你可以明天就试着改一改的流程或会议方式。

readings.title: 10 Usability Heuristics for User Interface Design
readings.story: 你设计了一个界面，用户却总在某个按钮前犹豫，或者找不到常用功能。这时候回头翻翻 Nielsen 的十条启发式，会发现大部分问题都能对号入座。它不像操作手册那样告诉你具体怎么做，而是提供一套检查清单，让你在评审或测试时知道该看什么。读的时候可以试着拿自己最近的项目对照每一条，看看哪些地方被忽略了。

readings.title: Jobs-to-be-Done
readings.story: 用户买一个产品，往往不是为了拥有它，而是为了完成某件事。Intercom 这篇关于 Jobs-to-be-Done 的文章把这种思路讲得很清楚：它帮你从“用户画像”转向“用户任务”，从而发现真正驱动购买的原因。读的时候可以关注作者如何区分“需求”和“任务”，以及怎样用这个框架来判断功能优先级。

companies.name: Cyberdesk
companies.originalOneLiner: Self learning computer use agent for developers
companies.originalDescription: Cyberdesk is the first self learning computer use agent for developers to automate desktop workflows. For example, one of our customers is building an AI agent for hospital patient intake, and they’re using us to automate an entire team of people manually clicking and typing into a desktop app to book appointments. We launched mid July, and our agent is already operating in production environments, creating appointments in electronic health record apps and processing files in legacy ERPs. We’ve built the first computer use agent that memorizes tasks and repeats them quickly while still adapting to unexpected changes on the screen. A good analogy is to how humans use computers: once we get used to an app, we use it much faster, while still adapting to random popups and crashes. This new paradigm for computer use will be needed by every company automating human workflows on computers. Mahmoud previously built robotic process automation solutions impacting 20K+ employees at a Fortune 100 company. He also built AI & ML solutions at Baylor College of Medicine Neuroscience & Texas Children's Hospital + co-published a paper at the Rice Networks Group. Alan is ex-NASA and previously dropped out to be the first founding engineer at a PearX startup. He is a second time founder, having previously built and scaled a consumer AI app to thousands of paying users. Computer-use agents will automate the $6T dollars spent on enterprise knowledge work and Cyberdesk will be the platform to power this. We’d love to talk with you! https://cal.com/mahmoud-al-madi-klrs5s/30min
companies.story: 想象你在医院前台，每天都要打开预约系统、病历系统和保险系统，把同一类信息来回复制。新人学这些步骤要很久，老员工也会被重复操作拖住。Cyberdesk 想做一个会学桌面操作的智能体，像熟练同事一样记住流程，遇到弹窗或界面变化也能调整。它的竞争力不在于会聊天，而在于能不能真的进入这些没有接口、只能靠人点击的老系统。YC 夏季 2025 批次这个背景，让它值得先看一眼。

companies.name: Robby
companies.originalOneLiner: AI agents that grow revenue for home services businesses
companies.originalDescription: Robby is an AI growth engine for home services businesses that uncovers revenue opportunities and collects additional data from every technician visit. Our AI combines customer and third party data to generate dozens of new leads every day, and then arms the technicians with talking points to increase close rates, giving GMs a single command center to manage and drive revenue. We have several paying customers that are each uncovering 6 figures in additional revenue opportunities every week. On our first day of launch, we helped close $40k in new business within an hour. Our team has spent the last few months riding along with dozens of technicians and shadowing every position in the office to best understand the industry. We're also studying for the EPA 608 exam to become certified technicians ourselves. Vineet and Feroze have both built critical products and infra at prominent startups (Ironclad, Porter, Affinity, Uber, Cloud Health Systems). Joe previously consulted PE firms on software acquisitions and led home services growth projects at Bain. We all met at Harvard Business School, and dropped out to work on Robby full-time.
companies.story: 假如你经营一家暖通维修公司，技师每天上门修设备，但他可能不知道这个家庭还有旧空调、过期保修或马上要换的配件。Robby 会提前把客户数据和外部线索整理出来，再告诉技师现场可以怎么聊。它不是只帮你记录客户，而是试图让每一次上门服务都多一点发现新收入的机会。公开资料里已经提到付费客户和新增收入机会，再加上它来自 YC 冬季 2026 批次，所以这类接地气的增长工具值得放进今天的列表。

companies.name: OnDeck AI
companies.originalOneLiner: Analyze any footage, without training a model
companies.originalDescription: OnDeck is the infrastructure layer that makes Vision Language Models accessible and scalable for enterprise. We let organizations instantly find any object, behavior or event, in any footage, without needing to train a model or collect any training data. The Pain: Creating vision models usually takes months: collecting training data, training, then deployment. Worse yet: + it’s often impossible to get enough data for a specific task, and + even the best cv models struggle to generalize across diverse camera setups, workflows and environments. To overcome these blockers, we bet early on the power of VLMs and built a vision engine that can generalize across any task and doesn’t need any training data. We published a NeurIPS workshop paper showing our new methods with VLMs beat traditional CV even at niche tasks. Our current customers include: - National Defense Organizations - Robotics Research - Security cameras - Behaviour analysis for port monitoring - Off-shore oil & gas monitoring
companies.story: 设想你管理一个仓库，摄像头每天录下大量画面，出问题时你想找“哪一辆叉车在某个时间段经过了这里”，传统办法常常是人工回看或重新训练模型。OnDeck AI 想让企业直接搜索视频里的对象和事件，不必每次都从头训练一套系统。它的看点在于，如果视觉模型真的能泛化到很多企业场景，视频就会从沉睡资料变成可查询的数据。它来自 YC 夏季 2025 批次，也赶上了企业视频越来越多、真正可用分析工具仍然稀缺的时点。

companies.name: Ruma Care
companies.originalOneLiner: The operations stack for biologic infusion clinics
companies.originalDescription: Ruma Care automates all admin work for infusion clinics - starting with prior authorizations & copay assistance enrollment. Biologics are expensive medications that cost $80-$150K+ per year per patient, and often need to be administered in specific settings called infusion clinics. Medical providers buy these drugs up front to secure pricing deals and safer inventory - they are reimbursed for the cost of the medications through the patients’ insurance. Current medical workflows aren't built for infusion clinics. Inventory, storage, transport, and billing is still managed through paper and excel spreadsheets. And because they’re so expensive, these specialty medications are denied by insurers at a rate of 37% each year. When they are denied, when workflows fail, or patients are infused before paperwork is cleared, providers don’t get reimbursed for the medication and are left covering the costs. Ruma Care solves this so clinics get paid, patients get treated faster, and care teams spend less time fighting forms. We do this in three ways: 1. For each medication, diagnosis, and insurance combination, Ruma extracts the submission criteria required to get the drug approved by insurers. 2. We pull out the correct forms, then automate the form-filling for prior authorizations. 3. Lastly, we enroll patients in copay assistance programs, all in one workflow and platform. We turn a process that traditionally spans 70+ online portals, disparate paper forms, and manual phone calling into a single, streamlined platform. As we process prior authorizations, our models learn from denial patterns to understand exactly what insurers need to see to get a prior authorization approved.
companies.story: 如果你在诊所负责运营，一个病人来做输注治疗，背后不只是安排时间，还要确认保险预授权、处理拒付、协调药品库存和账单。任何一步慢了，病人可能等不到药，诊所也可能收不到钱。Ruma Care 从这些后台流程切入，想把纸张、表格和电话追踪变成一套更清楚的运营系统。它来自 YC 冬季 2026 批次，选择的是生物制剂输注诊所这个很窄、但费用高、流程重的医疗场景。

companies.name: Voltair
companies.originalOneLiner: Autonomous Drones for Earth Observation
companies.originalDescription: Voltair is building the world's first globally distributed network of autonomous drones for Earth observation. Power utilities are the perfect first customer. Aging infrastructure and extreme weather drive the need for millimeter-scale inspection data on the power grid. Utilities spend tens of billions of dollars every year just looking at their own equipment. Autonomous drone fleets will enable utilities to inspect 7 million miles of infrastructure more frequently, quickly, and accurately. Our long-range, weatherized flying robots work with charging pads installed directly on utility poles. Each new pad unlocks 1000 square miles of coverage. With a charging network deployed on the power grid, we can serve existing multi-billion dollar data markets in road, rail and telecom inspection at 10x lower prices while enabling entirely new applications in hyperlocal weather monitoring, forestry, construction, search & rescue, and insurance. We envision a future in which drone "instances" are requested on-demand through our platform, enabling any application builder to serve these critical markets without ever operating their own hardware.
companies.story: 假如你在电力公司负责一大片线路，暴风雨过后要尽快知道哪根杆塔、哪段电线出了问题，但派人一处处看很慢也有危险。Voltair 想在电线杆附近部署充电点，让无人机自己反复巡检大片区域。它不是做普通航拍，而是想把电网变成无人机可以长期工作的基础设施。电网巡检既老、又贵、还越来越紧迫，所以这家 YC 冬季 2026 批次的自主无人机公司值得留意。

companies.name: Klaimee
companies.originalOneLiner: Liability insurance for AI Agents. You deploy agents, we cover you.
companies.originalDescription: Klaimee is the first insurance for your AI agents. It covers what traditional E&O and cyber explicitly carve out, so you can deploy agentic AI at scale with real peace of mind. Built for companies deploying agentic AI, self-serve from day one. The problem: AI agents are taking actions autonomously buying, emailing, modifying sensitive data. AB 316 already holds deployers liable. EU AI Act enforces in August. Cyber and E&O insurance are excluding AI claims. Companies shipping agents have zero coverage and no third-party proof their agent is safe. Enterprise legal asks "who pays if your agent breaks something?" and there's no good answer. We built the answer. Critical-category risk evaluation, certification, financial guarantee, liability insurance and the documentation enterprise procurement needs to sign off. Team: Ines (ex-General Manager at SafetyWing, grew insurance product from $5M to $60M revenue, 5 years launching insurance products from scratch and structuring a TokioMarine MGA into its own carrier) + Julien (AI software engineer + corporate strategy, enterprise compliance). We understand how insurance works, what enterprises require, and why startups can't wait 6 months for either.
companies.story: 假如你是公司法务，业务团队想让智能体自动发邮件、改数据、下订单，你不会只问它准不准，还会问它万一搞错了谁负责。传统网络保险和职业责任保险未必覆盖这种新风险。Klaimee 想做智能体的责任保险和风险认证，给企业一个更容易签字放行的答案。它来自 YC 春季 2026 批次，抓住的是企业很快会认真问的人工智能责任问题。

companies.name: Kita
companies.originalOneLiner: Automate credit review for lenders in emerging markets
companies.originalDescription: In emerging markets, open finance is still nascent. Most of the population is traditionally unbanked, banking APIs don’t exist, and a borrower’s financial history lives in documents: e-wallet records, bank statements, utility bills, and more. Because this data is unstructured, credit and risk teams are forced into manual review. This slows decisioning, increases costs, and caps lending volume. Kita is the AI platform for global lending operations. We help lenders in emerging markets automate application completion, document verification, and underwriting from messy financial documents — using AI to extract fraud-checked data and localized risk signals that power faster, better credit decisions. Under the hood, Kita is a learning engine. We link document-level signals to repayment outcomes, allowing our models to continuously improve fraud detection and risk assessment over time. This creates a compounding advantage for lenders as their distinct underwriting decisions feed back into the system. We’re Carmel and Rhea. We met before Stanford and have been building together ever since. Carmel is from Manila, is a repeat founder, and spent three years in product at Apple. Rhea has a research background in computer vision and received the highest honor in Stanford Computer Science. Together, we combine deep local context with strong technical execution to build the infrastructure that expands access to credit in emerging markets.
companies.story: 假如你在一家贷款机构工作，申请人的收入和还款能力不一定整齐地躺在银行接口里，而是散在电子钱包记录、银行流水、账单和各种文件中。人工一份份看很慢，也容易漏掉欺诈信号。Kita 想用人工智能把这些杂乱材料读出来，帮机构更快判断能不能放款。它是 YC 冬季 2026 批次的金融基础设施公司，处理的是新兴市场里贷款审核最麻烦的一段。

companies.name: One Robot
companies.originalOneLiner: World models for robot evals and training.
companies.originalDescription: One Robot builds simulation environments that are realistic to see and realistic to interact with, so robotics teams can train and evaluate robot policies without being bottlenecked by robot time. Today, improving a VLA often means more real-world hours: setting up the scene, running trials, resetting, and repeating. This loop is slow, expensive, and hard to scale. For example, material handling and manufacturing assembly tasks, models need far more training and evaluation data than teams can collect in the real world. We use task-specific data to build world model-based simulation environments for hard manipulation tasks (for example, textiles and box folding). These environments help teams run more training and evals, find failure modes faster, and accelerate iteration on action policies with less dependence on real-world data collection and robot availability.
companies.story: 想象你在做一个会折衣服或折盒子的机器人，每改一次模型，都要重新摆场景、跑测试、复位，再记录失败原因。这个过程又慢又贵。One Robot 做的是更接近真实交互的仿真环境，让团队先在模拟世界里大量训练和评估，再把更有希望的版本拿到真实机器人上试。它来自 YC 冬季 2026 批次，看点在于帮机器人团队省掉大量真实测试的时间。

companies.name: Origami Robotics
companies.originalOneLiner: Manipulate Anything Robot
companies.originalDescription: We are building a "manipulate anything" model with the robot hardware that embodies it. We designed a hand-based data-collection device and a high DOF, direct drive robotic hand that match each other exactly, enabling us to eliminate embodiment gap and collect real-world data and deploy it directly. We want to scale real world manipulation data by deploying our devices "in the wild" like manufacturing factories, logistic centers to collect Tesla like data, use these data to train our model and then provide automation solutions to these industries.
companies.story: 如果你想让机器人在真实世界里帮忙，它不能只会移动，还要会抓杯子、拿工具、折东西、摆放形状不同的物体。人觉得顺手的动作，对机器人来说很难。Origami Robotics 想做能操作更多物体的模型和配套机器人手，并用专门设备收集真实操作数据。它的竞争力取决于能不能把灵巧操作从演示变成稳定能力。它来自 YC 冬季 2026 批次，切的是机器人最难也最关键的部分之一，也就是“手”。

companies.name: Alt-X
companies.originalOneLiner: Automation for institutional-grade financial modeling in Excel
companies.originalDescription: Alt-X is building the AI-native liquidity layer for private markets. Private markets have created trillions of dollars in value, yet remain fragmented, illiquid, and inaccessible. While public markets benefit from exchanges, market makers, brokerages, and data infrastructure, private markets still rely on brokers, spreadsheets, and manual workflows to connect buyers and sellers. Alt-X uses AI to automate the core functions required to make private assets liquid. We streamline diligence, valuation, investor matching, and transaction execution, reducing the friction that makes private-market transactions slow, expensive, and opaque today. Our initial focus is venture-backed secondaries. We source opportunities from founders, employees, and early investors while building a network of accredited investors seeking exposure to the world's most valuable private companies. Over time, we believe every private asset—from startup equity to private credit and alternative investments—will require modern liquidity infrastructure. Building trusted infrastructure for private markets is difficult. Transactions involve complex diligence, fragmented information, transfer restrictions, and significant compliance requirements. Alt-X is focused on creating systems that can support real transactions at scale, not just marketplace listings. Ryan Samadi (Stanford CS/AI, former Citadel commodities trader) and Michael Wachsman (Cornell CS, infrastructure engineer) are building Alt-X because they believe ownership of innovation should be more liquid, transparent, and accessible. Today, Alt-X has sourced over $1.5 million in transaction opportunities and assembled a network of 40 accredited investors representing hundreds of millions of dollars in investable assets. Our mission is to democratize ownership of innovation by building the financial infrastructure that private markets have never had.
companies.story: 假如你持有一家未上市公司的股份，想提前卖掉一部分，事情不会像卖股票那样点一下就结束。你要找买家、做尽调、估值、处理文件，还要靠经纪人和表格来回撮合。Alt-X 想用人工智能自动化这些步骤，先从创业公司二级份额做起。它不是发明新资产，而是给一个巨大但低效的市场补交易基础设施。它是 YC 冬季 2026 批次的金融工具公司，值得看是因为私募市场里有很多想交易、但很难高效交易的资产。

readings.title: The intersection of company and product strategy
readings.story: 不要只从功能角度看产品，这是这篇最有用的提醒。很多产品讨论只盯着做什么功能，但功能为什么重要，取决于公司想赢在哪里。文章的核心价值在于说明产品策略不能和公司策略分开。一个功能如果不能支持公司的定位、客户选择和商业模式，就算做得很好也可能是分散注意力。

readings.title: Schlep Blindness
readings.story: 这篇更像常青阅读，不是追新闻。主题和被忽略的麻烦问题有关，属于隔几年回头看仍然有用的产品和策略文章。读的时候不用急着找最新信息，可以重点看作者怎样判断取舍，怎样理解用户，怎样把一个产品方向讲清楚。
